body.content: A food truck dedicated to the spirit of Texas barbecue, while also manufacturing equipment made in Reims, we prepare all our dishes using fresh ingredients, cooked with care and passion over several hours.  We take great pride in working with trusted suppliers and high-quality products to deliver rich, satisfying flavors. Whether you prefer beef, pork, or chicken, there is something for every taste — including hearty options for true meat lovers.  We cook with a 6-meter-long offset smoker, allowing us to serve guests quickly while maintaining the authentic low-and-slow barbecue experience.
